case_title: AMERICAN HOME REALTY NETWORK, INC. VS. GEARLDINE SPIETH et al

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT RE: DISMISSAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SPIETH, GEARLDINE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL - FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST - FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HOME REALTY NETWORK, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, MIKE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,295.00 FILED BY AMERICAN HOME REALTY NETWORK, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPIETH, GEARLDINE THOMPSON, MIKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL - FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST - FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HOME REALTY NETWORK, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPIETH, GEARLDINE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SEE SIGNATURE SERVED JUL-16-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPIETH, GEARLDINE

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HOME REALTY NETWORK, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS)
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) - GRANTED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT MIKE THOMPSON. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT WHO APPPEARED BY COURT CALL, EXCEPT DEFENDANT MIKE THOMPSON WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JASMINE LEUNG--FINANCE & OPERATIONS. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
